title: Create Aeronautics: Covers
description: Add covers to your Create contraptions and Aeronautics / Simulated physics ships.
body:
# Aeronautics Covers

Add covers to your Create contraptions and Aeronautics / Simulated physics ships.

Regular Cable Facades only work on static blocks. If you facade a cable and then assemble your ship, the facade falls off. Aeronautics Covers adds a new item, the **Cover**, that behaves exactly like a facade but survives assembly. Your covers travel with the contraption, render in flight, collide correctly, and come back to normal blocks on disassembly.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2e473156-0938-4d53-8b82-3837cf11e502.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2814a5b5-a80d-4bbc-b0a6-ec61cad059a2.png)

## How to use

Craft a cover the same way you craft a facade: put a cover and a block in the crafting grid. Right click a cable or any block to apply. Pick it off with the Cable Facades wrench. That is it.

If you want the cover to ride with a contraption, just make sure you use a Cover and not a regular Facade. The creative tab and the pink outline on the item icon tell the two apart.

## Requirements

- Cable Facades 2.0.1 or later
- Create: Aeronautics
